// Shadowbroker-inspired ICAO type classification.
export const HELI_TYPES=new Set(['R22','R44','R66','B06','B05','B47G','B105','B212','B222','B230','B407','B412','B429','B430','B505','BK17','S55','S58','S61','S64','S70','S76','S92','A109','A119','A139','A169','A189','AW09','EC20','EC25','EC30','EC35','EC45','EC55','EC75','H125','H130','H135','H145','H155','H160','H175','H215','H225','AS32','AS35','AS50','AS55','AS65','MD52','MD60','MDHI','MD90','NOTR','HUEY','GAMA','CABR','EXE','R300','R480','LAMA','ALLI','PUMA','NH90','CH47','UH1','UH60','AH64','MI8','MI24','MI26','MI28','KA52','K32','LYNX','WILD','MRLX','A149','A119']);export const TURBOPROP_TYPES=new Set(['AT43','AT45','AT72','AT73','AT75','AT76','B190','B350','BE20','BE30','BE40','BE9L','BE99','C130','C160','C208','C212','C295','CN35','D228','D328','DHC2','DHC3','DHC4','DHC5','DHC6','DHC7','DHC8','DO28','DH8A','DH8B','DH8C','DH8D','E110','E120','F27','F406','F50','G159','G73T','J328','JS31','JS32','JS41','L188','MA60','M28','N262','P68','P180','PA31','PA42','PC12','PC21','PC24','S2','S340','SF34','SF50','SW4','TRIS','TBM7','TBM8','TBM9','C30J','C5M','AN12','AN24','AN26','AN30','AN32','IL18','L410','Y12','BALL','AEST','AC68','AC80','AC90','AC95','AC11','C172','C182','C206','C210','C310','C337','C402','C414','C421','C425','C441','M20P','M20T','PA28','PA32','PA34','PA44','PA46','PA60','P28A','P28B','P28R','P32R','P46T','SR20','SR22','DA40','DA42','DA62','RV10','BE33','BE35','BE36','BE55','BE58','DR40','TB20','AA5']);export const BIZJET_TYPES=new Set(['ASTR','C25A','C25B','C25C','C25M','C500','C501','C510','C525','C526','C550','C551','C560','C56X','C650','C680','C700','C750','CL30','CL35','CL60','CONI','CRJX','E35L','E45X','E50P','E55P','F2TH','F900','FA10','FA20','FA50','FA7X','FA8X','G100','G150','G200','G280','GA5C','GA6C','GALX','GL5T','GL7T','GLEX','GLF2','GLF3','GLF4','GLF5','GLF6','H25A','H25B','H25C','HA4T','HDJT','LJ23','LJ24','LJ25','LJ28','LJ31','LJ35','LJ40','LJ45','LJ55','LJ60','LJ70','LJ75','MU30','PC24','PRM1','SBR1','SBR2','WW24','BE40','BLCF']);export const MILITARY_CALLSIGN_PREFIXES=new Set(['RCH','RRR','CNV','FORTE','LAGR','NATO','QID','BAF','IAM','SUI','NVY','GAF','HAF','ASY','ROF','UAF','RFF','TUAF','ARMY','NAVY','SPAR','REACH','PAT','FNY','KAF','BRS','MOOSE','DUKE','RFR','SAM','BOXER','HOMER','SHELL','JEEP','ORCA','SCOUT']);export function classifyAircraft(model,category){const normalizedModel=(model||'').toUpperCase();const normalizedCategory=(category||'').toLowerCase();if(normalizedCategory==='heli'||HELI_TYPES.has(normalizedModel)){return'heli';}if(normalizedCategory==='military'){return'military';}if(BIZJET_TYPES.has(normalizedModel)){return'bizjet';}if(TURBOPROP_TYPES.has(normalizedModel)){return'turboprop';}return'airliner';}export function mapClassificationToAircraftType(classification){if(classification==='heli'){return'Helicopter';}if(classification==='turboprop'){return'Regional';}if(classification==='bizjet'){return'Jet';}if(classification==='military'){return'Military';}return'Jet';}export function inferMilitaryByCallsign(callsign){if(!callsign){return false;}const normalized=callsign.replace(/[^A-Z0-9]/gi,'').toUpperCase();if(!normalized){return false;}const alphaPrefix=normalized.replace(/[0-9].*$/,'');if(!alphaPrefix){return false;}for(const prefix of MILITARY_CALLSIGN_PREFIXES){if(alphaPrefix.startsWith(prefix)){return true;}}return false;}
